diagnostics.message: "wheel" listener without { passive: true } — blocks scrolling performance. Only add { passive: true } if the handler does NOT call event.preventDefault() (passive listeners silently ignore preventDefault())
diagnostics.help: Add `{ passive: true }` as the third argument: `addEventListener('scroll', handler, { passive: true })`. Only do this if the handler does NOT call `event.preventDefault()` — passive listeners silently ignore `preventDefault()`, which breaks features like pull-to-refresh suppression, custom gestures, and nested-scroll containment.

diagnostics.message: font-bold on <h3> crushes counter shapes at display sizes — use font-semibold (600) or font-medium (500)
diagnostics.help: Use `font-semibold` (600) or `font-medium` (500) on headings — 700+ crushes letter counter shapes at display sizes

diagnostics.message: new Intl.NumberFormat() inside a function — hoist to module scope or wrap in useMemo so it isn't recreated each call
diagnostics.help: Hoist `new Intl.NumberFormat(...)` to module scope or wrap in `useMemo` — Intl constructors allocate dozens of objects per locale lookup

diagnostics.message: forwardRef is no longer needed on React 19+ — refs are regular props on function components; remove forwardRef and pass ref directly
diagnostics.help: Pass `ref` as a regular prop on function components — `forwardRef` is no longer needed in React 19+. Replace `useContext(X)` with `use(X)` for branch-aware context reads. Only enabled on projects detected as React 19+.

diagnostics.message: Import "m" with LazyMotion instead of "motion" — saves ~30kb in bundle size
diagnostics.help: Use `import { LazyMotion, m } from "framer-motion"` with `domAnimation` features — saves ~30kb

diagnostics.message: setFormElements([...formElements, ...]) — use functional update `setFormElements(prev => [...prev, ...])` to avoid stale closures
diagnostics.help: Use the callback form: `setState(prev => prev + 1)` to always read the latest value

diagnostics.help: Replace `indigo-*` / `gray-*` / `slate-*` with project tokens, your brand color, or a less-default neutral (`zinc`, `neutral`, `stone`)

diagnostics.message: "wheel" listener without { passive: true } — blocks scrolling performance. Only add { passive: true } if the handler does NOT call event.preventDefault() (passive listeners silently ignore preventDefault())
diagnostics.help: Add `{ passive: true }` as the third argument: `addEventListener('scroll', handler, { passive: true })`. Only do this if the handler does NOT call `event.preventDefault()` — passive listeners silently ignore `preventDefault()`, which breaks features like pull-to-refresh suppression, custom gestures, and nested-scroll containment.

diagnostics.help: Combine `.map().filter()` (or similar chains) into a single pass with `.reduce()` or a `for...of` loop to avoid iterating the array twice

diagnostics.message: Avoid initializing state in an effect. Instead, initialize "size"'s `useState()` with "undefined". For SSR hydration, prefer `useSyncExternalStore()`.
Import "m" with LazyMotion instead of "motion" — saves ~30kb in bundle size
diagnostics.help: Use `import { LazyMotion, m } from "framer-motion"` with `domAnimation` features — saves ~30kb

diagnostics.message: 3 setState calls in a single useEffect — consider using useReducer or deriving state
diagnostics.help: Combine into useReducer: `const [state, dispatch] = useReducer(reducer, initialState)`

diagnostics.message: outline-gray-900 reads as the Tailwind template default — use zinc (true neutral), neutral (warmer), or stone (warmest)
diagnostics.help: Replace `indigo-*` / `gray-*` / `slate-*` with project tokens, your brand color, or a less-default neutral (`zinc`, `neutral`, `stone`)

diagnostics.message: outline-gray-900 reads as the Tailwind template default — use zinc (true neutral), neutral (warmer), or stone (warmest)
diagnostics.help: Replace `indigo-*` / `gray-*` / `slate-*` with project tokens, your brand color, or a less-default neutral (`zinc`, `neutral`, `stone`)

diagnostics.message: font-bold on <h1> crushes counter shapes at display sizes — use font-semibold (600) or font-medium (500)
diagnostics.help: Use `font-semibold` (600) or `font-medium` (500) on headings — 700+ crushes letter counter shapes at display sizes

diagnostics.message: Em dash (—) in JSX text reads as model output — replace with comma, colon, semicolon, or parentheses
diagnostics.help: Replace em dashes in JSX text with commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses — em dashes read as model-output filler

diagnostics.message: Three-period ellipsis ("...") in JSX text — use the actual ellipsis character "…" (or `…`)
diagnostics.help: Use the typographic ellipsis "…" (or `…`) instead of three periods — pairs with action-with-followup labels ("Rename…", "Loading…")

diagnostics.message: new Intl.NumberFormat() inside a function — hoist to module scope or wrap in useMemo so it isn't recreated each call
diagnostics.help: Hoist `new Intl.NumberFormat(...)` to module scope or wrap in `useMemo` — Intl constructors allocate dozens of objects per locale lookup

diagnostics.message: forwardRef is no longer needed on React 19+ — refs are regular props on function components; remove forwardRef and pass ref directly
diagnostics.help: Pass `ref` as a regular prop on function components — `forwardRef` is no longer needed in React 19+. Replace `useContext(X)` with `use(X)` for branch-aware context reads. Only enabled on projects detected as React 19+.

diagnostics.message: Import "m" with LazyMotion instead of "motion" — saves ~30kb in bundle size
diagnostics.help: Use `import { LazyMotion, m } from "framer-motion"` with `domAnimation` features — saves ~30kb

diagnostics.message: "scroll" listener without { passive: true } — blocks scrolling performance. Only add { passive: true } if the handler does NOT call event.preventDefault() (passive listeners silently ignore preventDefault())
diagnostics.help: Add `{ passive: true }` as the third argument: `addEventListener('scroll', handler, { passive: true })`. Only do this if the handler does NOT call `event.preventDefault()` — passive listeners silently ignore `preventDefault()`, which breaks features like pull-to-refresh suppression, custom gestures, and nested-scroll containment.

diagnostics.message: Route property "validateSearch" must come before "head" — wrong order breaks TypeScript type inference
diagnostics.help: Follow the order: params/validateSearch → loaderDeps → context → beforeLoad → loader → head. See https://tanstack.com/router/latest/docs/eslint/create-route-property-order

diagnostics.message: navigate() called during render — use redirect() in beforeLoad/loader for route-level redirects
diagnostics.help: Use `throw redirect({ to: '/path' })` in `beforeLoad` or `loader` instead — navigate() during render causes hydration issues

diagnostics.message: font-bold on <h3> crushes counter shapes at display sizes — use font-semibold (600) or font-medium (500)
diagnostics.help: Use `font-semibold` (600) or `font-medium` (500) on headings — 700+ crushes letter counter shapes at display sizes

diagnostics.message: new Intl.NumberFormat() inside a function — hoist to module scope or wrap in useMemo so it isn't recreated each call
diagnostics.help: Hoist `new Intl.NumberFormat(...)` to module scope or wrap in `useMemo` — Intl constructors allocate dozens of objects per locale lookup

diagnostics.message: forwardRef is no longer needed on React 19+ — refs are regular props on function components; remove forwardRef and pass ref directly
diagnostics.help: Pass `ref` as a regular prop on function components — `forwardRef` is no longer needed in React 19+. Replace `useContext(X)` with `use(X)` for branch-aware context reads. Only enabled on projects detected as React 19+.

diagnostics.message: Import "m" with LazyMotion instead of "motion" — saves ~30kb in bundle size
diagnostics.help: Use `import { LazyMotion, m } from "framer-motion"` with `domAnimation` features — saves ~30kb

diagnostics.message: setFormElements([...formElements, ...]) — use functional update `setFormElements(prev => [...prev, ...])` to avoid stale closures
diagnostics.help: Use the callback form: `setState(prev => prev + 1)` to always read the latest value

diagnostics.message: bg-gray-100 reads as the Tailwind template default — use zinc (true neutral), neutral (warmer), or stone (warmest)
diagnostics.help: Replace `indigo-*` / `gray-*` / `slate-*` with project tokens, your brand color, or a less-default neutral (`zinc`, `neutral`, `stone`)

diagnostics.message: text-gray-500 reads as the Tailwind template default — use zinc (true neutral), neutral (warmer), or stone (warmest)
diagnostics.help: Replace `indigo-*` / `gray-*` / `slate-*` with project tokens, your brand color, or a less-default neutral (`zinc`, `neutral`, `stone`)

diagnostics.message: text-gray-400 reads as the Tailwind template default — use zinc (true neutral), neutral (warmer), or stone (warmest)
diagnostics.help: Replace `indigo-*` / `gray-*` / `slate-*` with project tokens, your brand color, or a less-default neutral (`zinc`, `neutral`, `stone`)

diagnostics.message: Array index "index" used as key — causes bugs when list is reordered or filtered
diagnostics.help: Use a stable unique identifier: `key={item.id}` or `key={item.slug}` — index keys break on reorder/filter

diagnostics.message: w-4 h-4 → use the shorthand size-4 (Tailwind v3.4+)
diagnostics.help: Collapse `w-N h-N` to `size-N` (Tailwind v3.4+) when both axes match

diagnostics.message: preventDefault() on <form> onSubmit — form won't work without JavaScript. Consider using a server action for progressive enhancement

diagnostics.message: Vague button label "Submit" — name the action ("Save changes", "Send invite", "Delete account") so screen readers and hesitant users know what happens
diagnostics.help: Name the action: "Save changes" instead of "Continue", "Send invite" instead of "Submit", "Delete account" instead of "OK". The label IS the button's accessible name

diagnostics.message: Import "m" with LazyMotion instead of "motion" — saves ~30kb in bundle size
